name: TestJoinJ1939PGEvent
title: TestJoinJ1939PGEvent
syntax: long TestJoinJ1939PGEvent (dword aPGN, dword aSourceAddress, dword aDestinationAddress)
description: Completes the current set of joined events with the transmitted event.This function does not wait.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: Message that should be awaited. Must be a J1939 parameter group.

parameters.name: aPGN
parameters.description: Parameter Group Number (with data page) of the message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: aSourceAddress
parameters.description: Source address of the message that should be awaited or 0xFFFFFFFF if source address is ignored.

parameters.name: aDestinationAddress
parameters.description: Destination address of the message that should be awaited or 0xFFFFFFFF if destination address is ignored.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
